sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 604 — Caracalla, AD 198-217. Bil Tetradrachm (12.62g), 25 mm. Struck at Syria, Laodicea. Laureate bearded bust of Caracalla facing r. Reverse: Eagle stg. facing hd. turned left holding wreath, star between
sales.description:
Caracalla, AD 198-217. Bil Tetradrachm (12.62g), 25 mm. Struck at Syria, Laodicea. Laureate bearded bust of Caracalla facing r. Reverse: Eagle stg. facing hd. turned left holding wreath, star between legs. NGC graded Mint State; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 5/5.  A lustrous example, excellent metal and well struck!  Estimated Value $500 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
